descriptions.description: The 5ml Sleek bottle offers a slim, modern profile for sample sprays. Its 13-415 neck fits fine mist sprayers for perfume and toner. Discovery sets and travel sizes get a contemporary look with this shape.
The 5ml Sleek roll-on bottle with a 13-415 neck. Perfume oil and essential oil blends apply smoothly with metal or plastic roller balls. The slim profile fits easily into pouches and gift sets.
The 5ml Sleek bottle offers a slim, modern profile. Its 13-415 neck fits fine mist sprayers or roll-on applicators. Discovery sets and travel sizes get a contemporary look.

An 8ml Sleek bottle with a 13-415 neck for fine mist spray samples. Perfume oil and essential oil mist brands use this for compact travel formats. The narrow silhouette fits easily into pouches and gift sets.
An 8ml Sleek roll-on bottle with a 13-415 neck. Perfume oil and essential oil blends apply smoothly. The narrow silhouette fits easily into pouches and gift sets.
An 8ml Sleek bottle with a 13-415 neck for spray or roll-on formats. The narrow silhouette fits easily into pouches and gift sets.
The 30ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck suits perfume and body spray. Fine mist sprayers thread on for a clean, minimal finish. A popular choice for modern fragrance and skincare brands.
The 30ml Sleek dropper bottle with an 18-415 neck. Essential oils, perfume oils, beard oil, and therapeutic blends dispense precisely. The slim profile suits aromatherapy and fragrance brands.
The 30ml Sleek reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and open-mouth formats for fragrance and aftershave. A classic pour-over application.
The 30ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands choose this for a classic spray format. The slim profile fits well in gift boxes.
The 30ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for lotion pumps. Serums and light creams dispense cleanly. Skincare brands use this for travel and trial sizes.
The 30ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck suits perfume and body spray. A popular choice for modern fragrance and skincare brands.

A 50ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck built for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands choose this for a classic spray format. The slim profile fits well in gift boxes and retail displays.
A 50ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.
A 50ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for fine mist sprayers. Eau de toilette and fragrance mist brands use this for travel sizes. The slim profile fits well in gift boxes.
A 50ml Sleek reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and open-mouth formats for fragrance and aftershave. A classic pour-over application.
A 50ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for lotion pumps. Serums and light creams dispense cleanly. Skincare brands use this for travel and trial sizes.
A 50ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck. Available in spray, dropper, reducer, and vintage bulb formats. The slim profile fits well in gift boxes.

The 100ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck accepts lotion pumps. Body lotion, hand cream, and serum brands use this capacity for full-size retail. The streamlined shape appeals to minimalist and contemporary brands.
The 100ml Sleek reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and concentrated fragrance formats. The streamlined shape suits luxury positioning.
The 100ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for fine mist sprayers. Full-size perfume and body mist formats. The streamlined shape appeals to minimalist brands.
The 100ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands use this for a decorative, full-size format.
The 100ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.
The 100ml Sleek bottle with an 18-415 neck. Available in lotion pump, spray, reducer, and vintage bulb formats. The streamlined shape appeals to minimalist brands.
